author: hjinco
description: Sync your vault across devices with end-to-end encryption. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Synch
manifest.description: Sync your vault across devices with end-to-end encryption.
manifest.name: Synch

name: Synch

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Synch 0.2.1

Released 2026-05-19.

## Added

## Changed

- Vault password validation errors are now translated in supported plugin languages.

## Fixed

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Synch 0.2.0

Released 2026-05-17.

## Added

- Add opt-in syncing for selected hidden folders.
- Add opt-in vault configuration sync for selected Obsidian settings, themes, snippets, and community plugin files.

## Changed

- Expand Japanese and Chinese translations across plugin settings, status, version history, deleted files, and vault management.
- Move remote vault create/connect actions into the Sync setting before a vault is connected.
- Stop packaging `versions.json` inside the downloadable plugin release assets.
- Show a confirmation after saving a self-hosted server URL.

## Fixed

- Prevent sync from modifying reserved vault paths such as Obsidian settings, Git metadata, Synch metadata, trash, and dependency folders.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Synch 0.1.9

Released 2026-05-14.

## Added

## Changed

- Remote vault management now opens in the same language as the Synch plugin when available.

## Fixed

- Replaced realtime sync sessions now report a clear local vault replacement error instead of a generic websocket close.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Synch 0.1.8

Released 2026-05-11.

## Added

- Version previews now show a line-by-line comparison against the current file when viewing text file history.

## Changed

- Sync push processing now reuses vault-scoped crypto work during a push, reducing repeated encryption setup for larger batches.
- Local sync reconciliation now reuses vault-scoped crypto work while queueing changes, reducing repeated encryption setup for larger batches.

## Fixed

- Signing out now disconnects the active remote vault on this device first.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Synch 0.1.7

Released 2026-05-09.

## Added

## Changed

- Device sign-in opens the browser flow in the language selected in Obsidian when supported.

## Fixed

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Synch 0.1.6

Released 2026-05-09.

## Added

- Added an option to permanently remove selected deleted files from version history to reclaim remote vault storage.
- Added Japanese, Simplified Chinese, and Traditional Chinese translations for the Obsidian plugin interface.
- Added localized billing and pricing links for Japanese, Simplified Chinese, and Traditional Chinese users.

## Changed

- Localized sync status and file-size-limit warnings now follow the selected Obsidian language more broadly.

## Fixed

- Sync now pauses when the configured Synch server reports an incompatible API version.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Synch 0.1.5

Released 2026-05-08.

## Added

- Added subscription status to the Obsidian plugin settings, with upgrade and billing management links.

## Changed

## Fixed

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Synch 0.1.4

Released 2026-05-07.

## Added

## Changed

- Clarified the plugin update notice to direct BRAT users to update from BRAT.

## Fixed

- Fixed sync recovery when a connected remote vault is no longer available by safely disconnecting the local Obsidian vault instead of repeatedly retrying unavailable sync access.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Synch 0.1.3

Released 2026-05-07.

## Added

## Changed

## Fixed

- Fixed excluded folder settings so selecting a parent folder also covers its subfolders, with nested exclusions shown as inherited instead of needing to be selected one by one.
- Fixed excluded folder saving to remove redundant nested folder entries when a parent folder is already excluded.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Synch 0.1.2

Released 2026-05-06.

## Added

## Changed

- Remote path changes now move existing vault files when possible instead of deleting and recreating them.
- Sync progress reporting now avoids scanning every stored entry after startup, improving responsiveness in larger vaults.

## Fixed

- Accepted push batches are now saved together so successful file changes stay recorded even when another file in the batch is rejected.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Synch 0.1.1

Released 2026-05-05.

## Added

- Korean translations for Synch plugin settings, commands, status labels, and vault management dialogs.

## Changed

- Shows an upgrade hint for older remote vaults that can be recreated to use the newer, more storage-efficient sync format.

## Fixed

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Synch 0.1.0

Released 2026-05-05.

## Added

## Changed

- Block sync connections when the remote vault requires an unsupported sync format version.
- Use a binary encrypted blob envelope for v2 sync-format vaults while keeping existing v1 vaults readable.

## Fixed

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Synch 0.0.10

Released 2026-05-05.

## Added

- Added a settings warning when files are blocked because they exceed the sync size limit.

## Changed

- Reduced the minimum remote vault password length to 12 characters.
- Improved the deleted files restore modal with select-all, in-list pagination, and bulk restore for selected files.
- Improved local sync reconciliation so large vault scans batch metadata updates more efficiently while preserving pending file changes.
- Improved the settings sync and storage status display so it updates in place while sync is running.

## Fixed

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Synch 0.0.9

Released 2026-05-05.

## Added

- Preview image file versions from version history.

## Changed

- Load deleted files from the server in pages and show only files that still have restorable version history.
- Keep deleted file restore actions visible while browsing long deleted-file lists, and show when a preview is loading.
- Pause sync and show an update-required status when the server requires a newer Synch plugin version.

## Fixed

- Keep stored sign-in sessions pending while offline instead of requiring sign-in again before sync can resume.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Synch 0.0.8

Released 2026-05-03.

## Added

- Show a mobile status indicator when Synch needs attention or storage is almost full.

## Changed

- Show plugin update availability as a compact badge in settings and refresh the check periodically while settings are open.
- Reduce concurrent push preparation work to keep sync uploads steadier on constrained devices and networks.

## Fixed

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Synch 0.0.7

Released 2026-05-03.

## Added

## Changed

## Fixed

- Stopped push from continuing blob uploads after vault storage quota is exhausted.
- Paused sync automatically when vault storage quota is exceeded.
- Kept files blocked when the server rejects an upload because the encrypted blob is too large.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Synch 0.0.6

Released 2026-05-03.

## Added

- Show an Obsidian status bar and settings warning when remote vault storage is almost full.
- Mark files in Obsidian's file explorer when Synch cannot sync them because their encrypted size exceeds the file size limit.

## Changed

- Show a loading spinner next to the settings sync status while sync is active or reconnecting.
- Scan changed local files faster during sync by reading file contents concurrently.

## Fixed

- Avoid unnecessary follow-up pulls after local changes are pushed when the accepted sync cursors are already contiguous with the last pulled checkpoint.
- Keep the connect vault dialog open when a password cannot unlock the vault, and prevent canceling while a connection attempt is still finishing.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Synch 0.0.5

Released 2026-05-03.

## Added

- Add a settings control to pause and resume automatic sync.

## Changed

- Show available plugin updates beside the settings heading instead of as a separate settings row.
- Show remote storage usage as its own settings row below sync status.
- Hide remote vault IDs from vault status text.
- Render Markdown deleted-file previews with Obsidian formatting while keeping non-Markdown previews as raw text.

## Fixed

- Reuse the existing version history pane instead of opening duplicate panes.
- Retry files that were blocked by the file-size limit after the vault policy is updated.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Synch 0.0.4

Released 2026-05-02.

## Added

- Preview synced file versions before restoring them from version history.
- Preview deleted files before restoring them when previewable text content is available.

## Fixed

- Avoid expensive automatic text merges when large files would exceed the merge budget.
- Keep the version history pane available after Obsidian restarts.
- Hide sync progress until a remote vault is connected.
- Detach the local vault cursor on remote vault disconnect, while still allowing local disconnect when the server cannot be reached.
- Prevent pushed local changes from advancing the pull checkpoint before earlier remote changes have been applied.
- Avoid rewriting files during pull when matching local content can be adopted safely, while still creating conflict copies for duplicate remote paths.
